positive: Minimalist geometric celestial body composition: A stylized, abstract depiction of a nebula cluster and orbiting planets. The main elements should be clean, flowing cosmic dust lines contrasting sharply against a deep midnight indigo background. Use limited, high-contrast color palette: cyan, electric lavender, and warm gold accents. Composition should be centered and suitable for a repeating pattern or single chest print. Style: Mid-century modern illustration meets Art Deco geometry. Focus on strong silhouettes and perfect symmetry. Graphic design quality, vector art aesthetic, isolated subject matter, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, grain, artifact, watermark, signature, text, dirty, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor composition, photorealism
